lineup_source: Germany vs Curaçao, Group E opener, 14 June 2026 (4-2-3-1)

players.name: Manuel Neuer
players.note: Born in Gelsenkirchen; no parental origin documented, German family assumed.

players.name: Joshua Kimmich
players.note: Born in Rottweil; no parental origin documented, German family assumed.

players.name: Jonathan Tah
players.note: Born in Hamburg to an Ivorian father and a German mother.

players.name: Nico Schlotterbeck
players.note: Born in Waiblingen; no parental origin documented, German family assumed.

players.name: Nathaniel Brown
players.note: Born in Amberg to an American father and a German mother; chose Germany over the USA.

players.name: Felix Nmecha
players.note: Born in Hamburg, the son of a German mother and an Igbo Nigerian father.

players.name: Aleksandar Pavlović
players.note: Born in Munich to a Serbian father and a German mother; dual citizenship.

players.name: Leroy Sané
players.note: Born in Essen; father Souleymane Sané a Senegalese international footballer, mother Regina Weber a German Olympic gymnast.

players.name: Jamal Musiala
players.note: Born in Stuttgart to a Nigerian-British father and a German mother (with Polish roots); raised in England.

players.name: Florian Wirtz
players.note: Born in Pulheim; parents (his agents) are German.

players.name: Kai Havertz
players.note: Born in Aachen; German family (distant Dutch ancestry on the father's side).
